Variable Rate Debt Policy - 25% Cap

payload.claim_text: The principal amount of Variable Rate Debt outstanding shall not exceed 25% of the aggregate principal amount of all outstanding obligations of the Authority

tool_args.label: Mansion Tax and Internet Sales Tax recommitted to Capital Program

payload.claim_text: The Mansion and Internet Marketplace Sales Taxes are now being recommitted to the 2020-2024 Capital Program, not the operating budget as assumed in the February Financial Plan, and the net effect is a $211 million decrease in budgeted operating subsidies through April
payload.subject: Capital Lockbox Funding

tool_args.label: Capital Lockbox funds may be used for operating costs due to COVID-19

payload.claim_text: The 2020-2021 NYS Enacted Budget amended Public Authorities Law 553-j, to allow the MTA to use monies in the Capital Lockbox funds in 2020 and 2021 to offset decreases in revenue or increases in operating costs due in whole or in part to the State emergency disaster caused by COVID-19
payload.subject: Capital Lockbox
